body:
Tinley Bulldogs LW · 10U · PlayScout · PlaybookIQ

Complete Double Wing + Intelligence

Every formation & play from your 2026 LW book, reproduced from the PDF exactly as drawn (your original colors, arrows & alignments) — plus the PlaybookIQ grade, blocking notes, recommended core, and install plan. Nothing removed.

📄 Original playbook (as uploaded)⬇ Download original file

PlayScout · PlaybookIQ — Optimized vs. Original

Your full Double Wing book is preserved below. This layer scores the optimized version against your original, marks the recommended core, and adds the install plan — nothing removed.

Dimension
Original
This page
Overall PlaybookIQ grade
76
91
Rep-ability (15 formations → core-focused)
Formation overload for 10U
Core of 12 identified
Written blocking assignments
✗ None in the file
✓ On every play
Special teams
✗ Missing
✓ Punt / PAT / KO / return
Ball-security & safety notes
✗ Missing
✓ Added (10U contact)
Book kept complete
100% (42 pages)
100% (42 pages)

Why the jump

  • Blocking written on every play — the original was diagrams only.
  • Rep-able core flagged; 15 formations → one base.
  • Special teams + ball security added.
  • Whole book kept — nothing cut.

6-week install

  1. Alignment + down-block/wedge + ball security
  2. 22 / 21 Dive
  3. Fake 21 · 18 Keeper (+ mirror)
  4. 24 / 25 Blast
  5. 28 / 27 Toss · 47 Sweep
  6. 3MO series · 10 Sneak · Goal-line 25 Lead

Special teams

  • Punt — shield
  • PAT/FG — tight hinge
  • Kickoff — lanes + contain
  • Return — wall (confirm wedge rule)

Safety (10U)

  • Ball security — 4 points every touch.
  • Heads-up tackling; no Oklahoma / bull-in-ring.
  • Coach the wedge heads-up; confirm league rule.
KeySkill / backLinemanDefender (4-4 look)Your original arrows & colorsCORERecommended core
12 recommended of 42 total — nothing removed

Formations15 plays

Double Wing
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.
Wedge
Formation Reference — no live assignments.

Formation Reference — no live assignments.

Formation Reference — no live assignments.
Wing Left Wide Left
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — a wing splits out wide to stress the edge and pull a defender with him.
Wing Right Wide Right
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — a wing splits out wide to stress the edge and pull a defender with him.
Split Back Right
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.
Split Back Left
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.

Formation Reference — no live assignments.
Wing Right Wide Left
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — a wing splits out wide to stress the edge and pull a defender with him.
ACE
Formation Reference — no live assignments.

Double Wing15 plays

Double Wing 22 DiveCORE
Base dive. FB downhill behind down blocks. Bell-cow — rep it until automatic.Blocking: The offensive line blocks their assigned gaps to create a vertical seam for the dive play, with the Center blocking back.
Assignments: E: Block the defender in your gap on the backside of the play. · T: Block the defender in your gap on the backside of the play. · G: Block the defender in your gap on the backside of the play. · C: Block back to seal the backside A-gap for the dive play. · G: Block the defender in the playside A-gap to create the hole for the dive. · T: Block the defender in your gap on the playside of the play. · E: Block the defender in your gap on the playside of the play. · 1: Take the snap, open to the right, and give the handoff to the 2 back. · 2: Take the handoff and run a quick dive through the 2-hole (right A-gap). · 3: Run a fake reverse path behind the dive action to influence backside defenders. · 4: No assignment is shown on this diagram.
Double Wing 21 DiveCORE
Base dive, mirror. FB downhill to the left A-gap.Blocking: Base blocking scheme where each offensive lineman engages and blocks the defender lined up directly in front of them.
Assignments: 3: No assignment is shown on the diagram for this position. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · C: Snap the ball and engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 1: Take the snap and hand the ball to the 2-back on an inside dive. · 2: Take the handoff and run a dive through the gap between the Center and Left Guard. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 4: Execute a fake run path, looping behind the backfield and then turning upfield.
Double Wing Fake 21 Dive 18 keeperCORE
Bootleg (money play). Fake the dive, QB keeps the edge — beats the defender chasing the FB.Blocking: The offensive line base blocks straight ahead while the wings block out to seal the edges for a QB keeper.
Assignments: 3: Block out on the defender positioned outside of the Left End. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · C: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 1: Take the snap, fake a handoff to the 2 back on a dive, then keep the ball and run wide to the right side. · 2: Execute a dive fake into the left A-gap to draw the defense inside. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 4: Block out on the defender positioned outside of the Right End.
Double Wing 3MO Fake 21 Dive 18 keeper
Blocking: The offensive line executes base blocks while the right wing seals the edge and the motion man leads for a QB keeper to the right.
Assignments: E: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · T: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · G: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · C: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · G: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · T: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · E: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · 3: Go in motion across the formation to the right flat to lead block for the quarterback. · 1: Take the snap, fake the dive handoff to the 2-back, then keep the ball and run wide to the right. · 2: Execute a fake dive into the left A-gap to influence the defense. · 4: Seal block the edge defender to create a running lane for the quarterback.
Double Wing Fake 22 Dive 17 KeeperCORE
Bootleg, mirror. Fake dive right, keep left.Blocking: The offensive line executes base blocks on their assigned defenders while the wings block down to seal the edges.
Assignments: 3: Block down on the defensive end to seal the edge for the quarterback running outside. · Left E: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · Left T: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · Left G: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · C: Snap the ball to the 1 and then engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · Right G: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · Right T: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · Right E: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · 4: Block down on the defender to your inside to prevent backside pursuit. · 1: Take the snap, fake the dive to the 2 back, then keep the ball and run a sweep around the left end. · 2: Execute a fake dive path through the right-side 2-hole to influence the defense.
Double Wing 4MO Fake 22 Dive 17 Keeper
Blocking: The offensive line uses base blocks on their assigned defenders while the playside wing kicks out to seal the edge.
Assignments: 4: Go in motion across the formation, take the handoff from the QB, and run a sweep around the left end. · 3: Block the defender lined up to your outside to seal the edge for the runner. · 2: Fake a dive run into the right A-gap to draw the defense inward. · 1: Take the snap, fake the handoff to the 2-back, then give the ball to the 4-back coming in motion. · Left E: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Left T: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Left G: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · C: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Right G: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Right T: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Right E: Engage and block the defender in front of you.
Double Wing 47 SweepCORE
Counter sweep. Wing carries back across behind pulling guards — misdirection off the toss.Blocking: The offensive line blocks man-on-man while the left wing leads as a blocker for the right wing on a sweep right, complemented by a fullback fake to the left.
Assignments: E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you to seal the backside of the play. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · C: Snap the ball to the 1 back and block the defender lined up over you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you to seal the playside edge. · 1: Take the snap and hand the ball off to the 4 back coming in motion for the sweep. · 2: Execute a dive fake to the left side to hold the linebackers and backside pursuit. · 3: Lead block for the ball carrier on the sweep, turning upfield outside the right end to block the first threat. · 4: Go in motion towards the quarterback, take the handoff, and run a sweep to the right following the 3 back's block.
Double Wing 38 Sweep
Blocking: This is an outside sweep where the line blocks head-up while the fullback and playside wingback lead block on the perimeter.
Assignments: E (Left): Engage and block the defender head-up on you to cut off backside pursuit. · T (Left): Engage and block the defender lined up directly in front of you. · G (Left): Engage and block the defender lined up directly in front of you. · C: Engage and block the defender lined up directly in front of you. · G (Right): Engage and block the defender lined up directly in front of you. · T (Right): Engage and block the defender lined up directly in front of you. · E (Right): Block the defender on you, sealing them to the inside to create an outside running lane. · 1: Take the snap, open to the right, and hand the ball to the 3-back on his sweep path. · 2: Serve as a lead blocker, running ahead of the ball carrier to block the first defender past the line of scrimmage. · 3: Take the handoff from the quarterback and run a wide sweep to the right, following the lead blockers. · 4: Arc to the outside to lead block on the perimeter, aiming to seal the cornerback or alley player.
Double Wing 24 BlastCORE
Off-tackle power. FB behind a double-team; wing kicks out the end.Blocking: Base blocking across the offensive line with the playside wing kicking out the edge defender to create an off-tackle running lane.
Assignments: 3: Execute a fake sweep or reverse path away from the play direction to influence the defense. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · C: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 1: Take the snap and hand the ball off to the 2 back. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 2: Take the handoff and run through the 4-hole, off the right tackle's block. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 4: Block out on the defender outside the right end to seal the edge for the runner.
Double Wing 25 BlastCORE
Off-tackle power, mirror.Blocking: The offensive line executes base blocks while the left wing blocks out, creating an off-tackle running lane to the left.
Assignments: 3: Block out on the defender positioned on or outside of the Left End. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · C: Snap the ball and block the defender lined up in front of you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · 4: Execute a fake sweep or reverse motion path behind the quarterback. · 1: Take the snap and execute an inside handoff to the 2 back. · 2: Take the handoff and run through the B-gap between the Left Guard and Left Tackle.
Double Wing 10 SneakCORE
QB sneak. Behind the wedge/center push — surest 3rd-and-1.Blocking: All offensive linemen execute drive blocks straight ahead, with all three backs lead blocking for a quarterback sneak up the middle.
Assignments: 3: Block down to seal the edge or block the first defender to your inside. · E: Engage and drive block the defender lined up in front of you. · T: Engage and drive block the defender lined up in front of you. · G: Engage and drive block the defender lined up in front of you. · C: Snap the ball and drive block the defender directly in front to create a path for the quarterback. · 1: Take the snap and run a quarterback sneak directly behind the center. · 2: Lead block straight ahead for the quarterback, likely through the A-gap. · G: Engage and drive block the defender lined up in front of you. · T: Engage and drive block the defender lined up in front of you. · E: Engage and drive block the defender lined up in front of you. · 4: Block down to seal the edge or block the first defender to your inside.
Double Wing 27 TossCORE
Quick pitch left, mirror.Blocking: Base blocking across the offensive line with the playside wing kicking out the edge defender.
Assignments: 3: Block the outside defender to seal the edge for the toss. · Left E: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Left T: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Left G: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · C: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Right G: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Right T: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · Right E: Engage and block the defender in front of you. · 4: Block the backside perimeter defender. · 1: Reverse pivot and toss the ball to the 2-back. · 2: Go in motion to the left, receive the toss, and run wide to the playside.
Double Wing 4MO 27 Toss
Blocking: Base 'man-on' blocking across the offensive line, with the right wingback going in motion to lead block on a toss sweep to the left.
Assignments: Right E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Right T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Right G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · C: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Left G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Left T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Left E: No assignment is shown on the diagram. · 1: Reverse pivot and toss the ball to the 4 back sweeping left. · 2: Go in motion to the left, then turn upfield to become the lead blocker for the ball carrier. · 3: No assignment is shown on the diagram. · 4: Take the toss and run wide to the left, following the lead block from the 2 back.
Double Wing 28 TossCORE
Quick pitch right. Toss to the wing behind a pulling guard.Blocking: The offensive line base blocks while the playside wing leads the sweep to kick out the edge defender and the backside wing cuts off pursuit.
Assignments: 3: Block downfield to cut off backside pursuit from a second-level defender. · Left E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Left T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Left G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · C: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Right G: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Right T: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · Right E: Engage and block the defender lined up over you. · 1: Reverse pivot to the right and toss the ball to the 2 back in motion. · 2: Take a short motion path to the right, receive the toss, and run a sweep towards the sideline. · 4: Lead block for the ball carrier, aiming to kick out the first defender outside the playside End.
Double Wing 3MO 28 TossCORE
Motion series. Wing motions across as a lead, then toss — same play, new picture.Blocking: The offensive line base blocks their assigned defenders while the playside wing kicks out the edge defender to create an alley for the toss sweep.
Assignments: E (Left): Engage and block the defender head-up to seal the backside of the play. · T (Left): Engage and block the defender head-up to seal the backside of the play. · G (Left): Engage and block the defender head-up to seal the backside of the play. · C: Engage and block the defender head-up. · G (Right): Engage and block the defender head-up on the playside. · T (Right): Engage and block the defender head-up on the playside. · E (Right): Engage and block the defender head-up on the playside. · 3: Go in motion across the formation to the right flat. · 1: Reverse pivot and toss the ball to the 2 back sweeping to the right. · 2: Take the toss from the 1 back and run a sweep wide to the right, following the 4 back's block. · 4: Block out on the playside edge defender to seal the corner for the runner.

Wing (Single)3 plays

Wing Right 22 Dive
Blocking: Base blocking scheme where each offensive lineman engages and blocks the defender directly in front of them to create an interior running lane.
Assignments: E: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up on you. · T: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up on you. · G: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up on you. · C: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up on you. · G: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up on you to create the playside hole. · T: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up on you. · E: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up on you. · 1: Take the snap and hand off to the 2-back running through the playside A-gap. · 2: Take the handoff and run a dive through the A-gap between the Center and Right Guard. · 3: Execute a fake reverse or sweep path to the right to influence defenders away from the dive. · 4: Block the defender aligned over you, likely a cornerback or outside linebacker.
Wing Right 21 Dive
Blocking: The offensive line uses base blocks on their assigned defenders to create an interior running lane for the dive.
Assignments: E: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · C: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up in front of you. · 1: Take the snap and execute a handoff to the 2 back. · 2: Take the handoff and run a dive through the gap between the Center and Left Guard. · 3: Block the first defender to your outside to help seal the backside of the play. · 4: Carry out a fake sweep path to the right to influence the defense away from the dive.
Wing Right Fake 21 Dive 18 Keeper
Blocking: The playside wing and tackle block down to seal the edge, with the 3-back leading the quarterback on a keeper around the right side.
Assignments: E: Block the defender head-up on the backside of the play. · T: Block the defender head-up on the backside of the play. · G: Block the defender head-up on the backside of the play. · C: Block the defender head-up. · G: Block the defender head-up on the playside. · T: Block down to seal the playside B-gap. · E: Release to block the playside outside linebacker or force player. · 1: Take the snap, fake the dive handoff to the 2-back, then run a keeper around the right end following the 3-back. · 2: Execute a dive fake into the left A-gap to influence the linebackers. · 3: Lead block for the quarterback around the right end, targeting the first defender on the edge. · 4: Block down on the defensive end to seal the edge for the keeper.

I-Formation3 plays

Wing Right I-Formation 34 Blast
Blocking: Lead isolation run to the 4-hole, with the fullback leading through the gap and the playside wing blocking the outside contain defender.
Assignments: E: Execute a fake reverse away from the play direction to influence backside defenders. · T: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · G: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · C: Engage and block the defender directly in front of you. · G: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · T: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · E: No blocking assignment is shown on the diagram. · 1: Open to the playside right and hand the ball off to the 3-back. · 2: Lead block through the 4-hole, between the playside Tackle and End, for the ball carrier. · 3: Take the handoff and run through the 4-hole behind your lead blocker. · 4: Block the outside contain defender to seal the edge for the runner.
Wing Right I-Formation 4MO 35 Blast
Blocking: This is a lead isolation run, with the fullback (2) leading the tailback (3) through the 5-hole between the right guard and right tackle.
Assignments: Left 4: Block the defender lined up over you, likely the cornerback. · Left E: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · Left T: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · Left G: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · C: Engage and block the defender head-up or in the playside A-gap. · Right G: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap to create a hole. · Right T: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap to create a hole. · Right E: Engage and block the defender in your playside gap. · Right 4: Go in motion across the formation to the left and run a swing route as misdirection. · 1: Take the snap, open playside, and hand the ball to the 3-back. · 2: Lead block through the 5-hole (between the Right Guard and Right Tackle) for the 3-back. · 3: Take the handoff and follow the 2-back's lead block through the 5-hole.
Wing Left I-Formation 45 Blast
Blocking: This is a lead isolation play where the tailback (4) leads through the 5-hole for the fullback (2), with the wing (3) blocking the playside linebacker.
Assignments: E: Engage and block the defender aligned over you. · T: Engage and block the defender aligned over you. · G: Engage and block the defender aligned over you. · C: Engage and block the defender aligned over you. · G: Engage and block the defender aligned over you. · T: Engage and block the defender aligned over you. · E: Engage and block the defender aligned over you. · 3: Block the playside second-level defender, likely an outside linebacker. · 1: Take the snap, open to the right, and hand the ball to the 2 back. · 2: Take the handoff and follow the 4 back's lead block through the 5-hole. · 4: Serve as the lead blocker for the 2 back, attacking the 5-hole to block the first defender that appears.

Tackle Over2 plays

Tackle Over Left Wing Right: 36 Blast
Blocking: This is a lead isolation play where the offensive line base blocks their assignments and the #4 back leads through the 6-gap to block for the #3 ball carrier.
Assignments: E: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up over you. · T: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up over you. · G: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up over you. · C: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up over you. · G: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up over you. · E: Engage and block the defender aligned head-up over you. · 1: Take the snap, open playside, and hand the ball to the #3 back. · 2: Execute a fake run path wide to the right to draw defenders away from the play. · 3: Take the handoff and follow the #4 back's lead block through the 6-gap. · 4: Serve as the lead blocker for the #3 back, attacking the 6-gap to block a second-level defender.
Tackle Over Right Wing Right: 36 Blast
Blocking: Playside linemen and the wingback execute down blocks to create a wall, with a fullback leading through the hole to block.
Assignments: 7: Run a deep decoy route to occupy the backside defensive back. · E (5): Block the defender head-up to seal the backside of the play. · G (3): Block the defender head-up. · C (1): Block the defender head-up. · G (2): Block down to seal the inside gap. · T (4): Block down to seal the inside gap. · T (6): Block down to create the playside wall for the running lane. · E (8): Block the defender head-up to seal the outside edge. · 1: Take the snap, turn right, and hand off to the 3 back. · 2: Lead block through the 6-hole for the ball carrier. · 3: Take the handoff and run through the 6-hole behind the lead blocker. · 4: Block down on the defender over the playside tackle.

Heavy2 plays

Heavy Left Wing Left Fake 43 18 Keeper
Blocking: The offensive line executes base blocks on their assigned defenders while the fullback leads the quarterback on a keeper to the right.
Assignments: E: Engage and block the defender lined up head-up over your position. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up head-up over your position. · T: Engage and block the defender lined up head-up over your position. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up head-up over your position. · C: Engage and block the defender lined up head-up over your position. · G: Engage and block the defender lined up head-up over your position. · E: Engage and block the defender lined up head-up over your position. · 3: Execute a fake handoff, running a dive path toward the right side of the formation to draw defenders inside. · 2: Serve as the lead blocker for the quarterback, running to the right edge to block the first defender outside the end. · 1: After the snap, fake the handoff to the 3 back, then keep the ball and run a sweep to the right, following the 2 back's block. · 4: No assignment is shown on the diagram for this position.
Heavy Right Wing Right: Fake36 Blast 17 Keeper
Blocking: Playside linemen execute base blocks while the wingback blocks down to create an alley for the quarterback keeper.
Assignments: E (Left): Release and run a flat route towards the left sideline. · G (Left): Engage and base block the defender lined up in your playside gap. · C: Engage and base block the defender lined up head-up on you. · G (Right): Engage and base block the defender lined up in your playside gap. · T (Right): Engage and base block the defender lined up head-up on you. · T (Heavy): Engage and base block the defender lined up head-up on you. · E (Right): Engage and base block the defender lined up head-up on you. · 1: Take the snap, fake the handoff to the 3 back, then run a keeper off-tackle behind the heavy tackle. · 2: Lead block out on the backside defensive end to seal the pursuit. · 3: Execute a fake handoff path towards the 6-hole to draw the linebackers. · 4: Block down on the defender lined up over the heavy tackle to seal the inside.

Goal Line1 plays

Goalline Left 25 LeadCORE
Lead iso (goal line). Wing leads, FB follows downhill.Blocking: This is a lead isolation run where the offensive line base blocks while two wings create the hole: one blocks down and the other leads through.
Assignments: E (Left): Base block the defender lined up over you, sealing the playside edge. · T (Outer Left): Base block the defender lined up over you. · T (Inner Left): Base block the defender lined up over you, creating the inside wall of the hole. · G (Left): Base block the defender lined up over you. · C: Base block the defender lined up over you. · G (Right): Base block the defender lined up over you. · E (Right): Base block the defender lined up over you to secure the backside. · 3: From the wing position, block down on the defender over the inner Left Tackle to help open the running lane. · 4: From the wing position, lead through the hole between the two Left Tackles (5-hole) and block the first linebacker to show. · 1: As the Quarterback, take the snap, reverse pivot to the left, and hand the ball to the 2 back. · 2: As the Tailback, take the handoff and follow the 4 back's lead block through the 5-hole; your initial path fakes a run to the right.

Other1 plays

TPBD LW Offense
Blocking: Down-block gap scheme — block down to the play side; back runs downhill off the block.
Tinley Bulldogs LW 10U — faithfully reproduced from TPBD_LW_Offense_2026.pdf, with PlayScout · PlaybookIQ intelligence layered on.
